SEARCH
Package shot_boxes.questions

Class MidQuestions

java.lang.Object
shot_boxes.questions.Questions
shot_boxes.questions.MidQuestions
All Implemented Interfaces:
ShotBoxes
public class MidQuestions extends Questions implements ShotBoxes
Represents a medium-level question box in the game.

MidQuestions are dropped by mid-level knowledge keepers and represent moderate difficulty questions. They offer more points than easy questions but fewer than hard ones.

The box moves downward from the top of the screen and is removed or reset if it reaches the bottom without player interaction.

Version:
1.0
Author:
Ahmet Buğra Ertürk

  • Constructor Details

    • MidQuestions

      public MidQuestions(String question, int point)
      Constructs a MidQuestions object with the given question text and point value.
      Parameters:
      question - the medium-difficulty question to present to the player
      point - the number of points awarded for interacting with this question

  • Method Details

    • move

      public void move(KnowledgeKeepers k, int X)
      Starts the downward movement of the question box from a given horizontal position.

      The question moves at a medium speed (defined as speeds[1]) and resets upon reaching the bottom of the screen.

      Specified by:
      move in interface ShotBoxes
      Parameters:
      k - the KnowledgeKeeper who shooted this ShotBox
      X - the horizontal position from which the question starts descending
